name: honeypot-camera
description: Observation camera honeypot. Tool: https://github.com/alexbredo/honeypot-camera. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #401 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map honeypot-camera output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved honeypot-camera output file to parse instead of running it live.
